obsidian-things

An Obsidian theme inspired by the beautifully-designed app, Things.

  • obsidian-things (GITHUB) – https://github.com/colineckert/obsidian-things

obsidian-things markdown

Basic

  • [ ] [ ] to-do
  • 🔲 [_] to-do (modified)
  • 🟧 [/] incomplete
  • ❎ [x] done
  • ➖ [-] canceled
  • ➡️ [>] forwarded
  • 📅 [<] scheduling

Extras

  • ❓ [?] question
  • ⚠️ [!] important
  • ⭐ [*] star
  • 💬 ["] quote
  • 📍 [l] location
  • 🔖 [b] bookmark
  • ℹ️ [i] information
  • 💰 [S] savings
  • 💡 [I] idea
  • 👍 [p] pros
  • 👎 [c] cons
  • 🔥 [f] fire
  • 🔑 [k] key
  • 🏆 [w] win
  • 📈 [u] up
  • 📉 [d] down
  • 🚧 [D] draft pull request
  • 👀 [P] open pull request
  • 🔀 [M] merged pull request
